[Promoting Thinking] Children can customize their own designs on magical scratch paper, unlimited DIY art craft projects, suitable for children's creativity, vision and aesthetic ability, turn. interesting colors into imaginative pictures
[Easy to use] Swipe on the black matte surface of the paper with a wooden pen to reveal the bright rainbow colors below, and instantly have colorful creations.

[Wide Use] Kids and adults make their own party decorations, school classroom supplies, birthday parties, , jungle animals, farm animal themed parties, classroom art projects, preschool, kids clothing parties, craft activities

description: Product Description Perfect Combination The set includes 50Pcs Black Magic Scratch Art Notes, 4 template rulers and 5 wooden pens. The size of art craft paper is approx 8.5*8.5*CM(L x W) The size of the template ruler is: 15*6.5CM The length of the wooden pen is: 14CM Easy to use The design logic of our scratch painting art paper is very ergonomic, and the operation is very simple. Children aged 3-14 can handle it easily. Wooden pens can easily scratch off the black layer to reveal colorful hues. With the help of the template ruler, you can easily draw the pattern you like. Easy to Clean Our scratch art surface is made of odorless black ink, and the debris generated during the creation process is easy to clean up, making it fun for children to keep clean and hygienic while playing. At the same time, it does not contain any toxic substances, so mothers do not have to worry about harming the child, but it is not recommended for children under the age of 3 to avoid swallowing. Best Gift for Boys & Girls This rainbow scratch pad bulk is full of attraction for kids. When their receive it, will see many scratch papers and tools for scratch creation. Every scratch will magically appear colorful colors, and the fun & simple game makes it an ideal gift for girls, boys, and even curious teenagers.
